user_query: Update mothers teriyaki salmon bowl lunch to a tofu based dish

updates.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 2 > Mother > Day 2 > Lunch > Japanese Teriyaki Salmon Donburi

meal_suggestion.from: Pan-sear salmon skin-side down until crispy, then glaze with a mix of soy sauce, mirin, and a touch of sugar. Serve over steamed rice with steamed broccoli and a small mound of pickled ginger. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced nori.
meal_suggestion.to: Press a block of firm or extra-firm tofu for 15–30 minutes to remove excess water. Cut into thick slices or cubes, toss lightly in cornstarch, and pan-fry in a small amount of oil until golden and crispy on all sides. In a small pan, combine low-sodium soy sauce, mirin, a touch of maple syrup or sugar, and a splash of rice vinegar; simmer until slightly thickened to make teriyaki glaze. Toss the cooked tofu in the glaze to coat. Serve over steamed white or brown rice with steamed broccoli and a small mound of pickled ginger. Garnish with sesame seeds, sliced scallions, and nori strips.

nutrition_note.from: Salmon is rich in omega-3 fatty acids supporting heart and brain health; broccoli provides fiber, vitamin C, and sulforaphane; rice offers sustained energy. Teriyaki glaze contains sodium and sugar — make homemade to control amounts. Pickled ginger aids digestion.
nutrition_note.to: Swapping salmon for tofu creates a plant-based source of high-quality protein and reduces saturated fat. Tofu provides iron, calcium (if fortified), and isoflavones. The bowl still supplies complex carbohydrates from rice and fiber plus vitamins from broccoli. Making the teriyaki glaze at home lets you cut added sugar and sodium compared with store sauces. Overall, this keeps the savory-sweet flavor profile while offering a lower-fat, vegetarian-friendly option.

short_description.from: Pan-seared salmon fillet glazed with homemade teriyaki sauce, served over a bowl of steamed rice with steamed broccoli and pickled ginger.
short_description.to: Crispy pan-fried tofu glazed with a homemade teriyaki sauce, served over steamed rice with steamed broccoli and a side of pickled ginger — a satisfying tofu-based bowl with the same savory-sweet flavors.

updates.reasoning: Transformed the teriyaki salmon donburi into a tofu-based donburi. Rewrote name, short_description, meal_suggestion, ingredients, and nutrition_note to reflect the protein swap and updated preparation.
